array.string:
# Log rotation first /Users/jeffbridwell/CascadeProjects/chorus/platform/scripts/log-rotate.sh >> /Users/jeffbridwell/Library/Logs/Gathering/cruft-scan-latest.md 2>&1
# Cruft scan: disk, stale briefs, board audit echo "=== Cruft scan $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') ===" >> /Users/jeffbridwell/Library/Logs/Gathering/cruft-scan-latest.md diskutil info / | grep 'Available Space' >> /Users/jeffbridwell/Library/Logs/Gathering/cruft-scan-latest.md 2>&1 echo "Board snapshot sizes:" >> /Users/jeffbridwell/Library/Logs/Gathering/cruft-scan-latest.md ls -lh /Users/jeffbridwell/CascadeProjects/chorus/proving/logs/board-snapshot-*.json 2>/dev/null | awk '{print " "$5" "$9}' >> /Users/jeffbridwell/Library/Logs/Gathering/cruft-scan-latest.md echo "=== Done ===" >> /Users/jeffbridwell/Library/Logs/Gathering/cruft-scan-latest.md
